title: Redaction Rule
description: A single field-level redaction. Multiple rules combine into a redact decision. The MCP server applies redactions to the response before returning to the agent.

fieldPath.description: JSON Pointer (RFC 6901) selecting the field to redact. Wildcards via /*/ for arrays.

redactionMode.description: mask: replace with '***'. drop: remove field entirely. hash: replace with sha256. tokenize: replace with reversible token (requires KMS).

tokenizationKeyId.description: When mode=tokenize, the KMS key id to use.

appliesTo.description: Action patterns (glob) the rule applies to. Empty = applies to all.
